hypothesis: If trained on the ChEMBL3D dataset and equipped with stereochemical graph augmentations, the LoQI diffusion model will generate low-energy conformers for diverse drug-like and macrocyclic molecules whose geometries and relative energies closely match DFT-optimized references (within chemical accuracy) while preserving molecular topology and stereochemistry (R/S and E/Z) even for molecules with many rotatable bonds.
